name: @forgeax/bevy-axes
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `gizmos/axes` example (each entity's local coordinate frame drawn as three colored arrows) — a debug-draw demo exercising the new DebugDraw axes/arrow gizmo primitives (mapping Bevy gizmos.axes), drawing per-entity X=red/Y=green/Z=blue local axes via app.debugDraw each frame.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: axes gizmo demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: axes gizmo demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy gizmos/axes reproduction
